name: city-of-mist
description: City of Mist system for Foundry VTT

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && copyfiles -u 1 src/**/*.css src/**/*.json src/**/*.png src/**/*.webp src/**/*.html src/**/*.hbs src/**/*.mp3 src/**/*.wav src/**/*.otf src/**/*.woff2 src/**/*.ttf src/**/*.gif dist/ && copyfiles README.md dist/ && npm run sync:manifest
scripts.package: npm run build && mkdir -p release && rm -f release/city-of-mist-custom.zip && cd dist && zip -qr ../release/city-of-mist-custom.zip city-of-mist

author: taragnor
